title: Disaggregating latent causes for computer system optimization
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for disaggregating latent causes for computer system optimization. In one aspect, a method includes accessing a data stream for data values resulting from operations performed by a computer system; providing the data values as input to a data disaggregation machine learning model that generates descriptors of latent causes of the data values; providing the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values as inputs to a control system model that generates embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system; determining commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system based on the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system; and providing the commands to the computer system.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: CLAIMS 1. A method performed by a data processing apparatus, comprising: accessing a data stream for data values resultmg from operations performed by a computer system of one or more computers, the data values being descriptive of the operations performed by the computer system; providing the data values as input to a data disaggregation machine learning model that generates, based on the data values, descriptors of latent causes of the data values, wherein the data disaggregation model includes a set of data disaggregation model parameters; processing, by the data disaggregation model, the data values according to the set of data disaggregation model parameters to generate the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values; providing the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values as inputs to a control system model that generates embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system, wherein the control system model includes a set of control system model parameters; processing, by the control system model, the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values according to the set control system model parameters to generate the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system; determining commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system based on the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system generated by the control system model; and providing the commands to the computer system. 2. The method of claim 1 , further comprising training the data disaggregation model using log data that stores data values resulting from operations previously performed by the computer system. 3. The method of claim 1, further comprising training the data disaggregation model using data values from the data stream, and wherein accessing the data stream comprises receiving the data stream from the computer system. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the data disaggregation model is implemented in hardware. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the data disaggregation model is a variational auto- encoder. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the data values are program counter values, and the operations performed by the computer system include program instruction increments. 7. The method of claim 1, wherem the data values are memory address values, and the operations performed by the computer system include memory accesses. 8. The method of claim 1, further comprising: determining a performance measure of the control system model based on the data values and the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system; and adjusting the set of control system model parameters based on the performance measure. 9. The method of claim 1 , wherein the control system model is a recurrent neural network. 10. The method of claim 1, wherein the commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system are commands to pre-fetch data stored at memory addresses. 11. A system, comprising: a data disaggregation machine learning model that: receives data values resulting from operations performed by a computer system of 

 one or more computers, the data values being descriptive of the operations performed by the computer system; and generates, based on the data values, descriptors of latent causes of the data values, wherem the data disaggregation model includes a set of data disaggregation model parameters; and a control system model that: receives the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values as inputs to the control system model; and generates embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system, wherein the control system model includes a set of control system model parameters; and a command generation engine that: receives the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system generated by the control system model; determines commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system based on the embedded representations of commands generated by the control system model; and provides the commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system to the computer system. 12. The system of claim 11, wherein the data disaggregation model is a variational auto- encoder. 13. The system of claim 1 1, wherein the data values are program counter values, and the operations performed by the computer system include program instruction increments. 14. The system of claim 11, wherein the data values are memory address values, and the operations performed by the computer system include memory accesses. 15. The system of claim 1 1, wherein the data disaggregation model is implemented in hardware. 16. A computer storage medium encoded with a computer program, the program comprising instructions that when executed by data processing apparatus cause the data processing apparatus to perform operations comprising: accessing a data stream for data values resulting from operations performed by a computer system of one or more computers, the data values being descriptive of the operations performed by the computer system; providing the data values as input to a data disaggregation machine learning model that generates, based on the data values, descriptors of latent causes of the data values, wherein the data disaggregation model includes a set of data disaggregation model parameters; processing, by the data disaggregation model, the data values according to the set of data disaggregation model parameters to generate the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values; providing the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values as inputs to a control system model that generates embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system, wherein the control system model includes a set of control system model parameters; processing, by the control system model, the data values and the descriptors of the latent causes of the data values according to the set control system model parameters to generate the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system; determining commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system based on the embedded representations of commands to modify the operations performed by the computer system generated by the control system model; providing the commands to the computer system. 17. The computer storage medium of claim 16, wherein the data disaggregation model is a variational auto-encoder. 18. The computer storage medium of claim 16, wherein the data values are program counter values, and the operations performed by the computer system include program instruction increments. 19. The computer storage medium of claim 16, wherein the data values are memory address values, and the operations performed by the computer system include memory accesses. 20. The computer storage medium of claim 16, wherein the data disaggregation model is implemented in hardware.
